name: arivu-tui-bun
//: Bun-facing manifest for the arivu-tui VIEWER, kept OUT of the pnpm workspace (pnpm-workspace.yaml is packages/**) so the two package managers never fight over one package.json. The viewer's own pnpm manifest stays at packages/arivu-tui/package.json (typecheck + vitest, unchanged). @kolu/* are NOT deps here — they are hydrated from the Nix store at build time (see ../default.nix), exactly as drishti hydrates @kolu/surface. The dependencies below are the FLAT npm closure those hydrated sources resolve from the hoisted root node_modules: @orpc/* + zod (@kolu/surface{,/server,/define,/links/*} + surface-nix-host + arivu-contract), solid-js + @solid-primitives/scheduled (@kolu/surface), cleye (arivu-tui's CLI), and @opentui/core + @opentui/solid (the OpenTUI render; @opentui/core pulls its per-arch native libopentui.so as an optional dep, bun2nix FODs it). Versions track the workspace so the hydrated sources resolve one matching copy.
